  n, m = gets.split.map(&:to_i)

  m.times do

    reports << [x-1, y-1, z]

      result = ""

      end
      puts result

def check_consistent(n, reports, erratic_mask)

  (0...(1 << n)).each do |reliable_mask|
    valid = true
    
    reports.each do |x, y, z|
      x_reliable = (reliable_mask >> x) & 1 == 1
      y_reliable = (reliable_mask >> y) & 1 == 1
      x_erratic = (erratic_mask >> x) & 1 == 1
      

      should_report_reliable = y_reliable
      

      if x_reliable && !x_erratic

        actual_report = should_report_reliable ? 0 : 1
      elsif !x_reliable && !x_erratic

        actual_report = should_report_reliable ? 1 : 0
      elsif x_reliable && x_erratic

        actual_report = should_report_reliable ? 1 : 0
      else

        actual_report = should_report_reliable ? 0 : 1
      end
      
      if actual_report != z
        valid = false
        break
      end
    end
    
    if valid
      return true
    end
  end
  
  false
end

def main()
  input_data = STDIN.read.split
  return if input_data.empty?
  
  n = input_data[0].to_i
  m = input_data[1].to_i
  
  adj = Array.new(n + 1) { [] }
  m.times do |i|
    u = input_data[2 + 3 * i].to_i
    v = input_data[2 + 3 * i + 1].to_i
    z = input_data[2 + 3 * i + 2].to_i
    adj[u] << [v, z]
  end

  erratic = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  status = Array.new(n + 1, -1)
  
  possible = true
  (1..n).each do |i|
    next if status[i] != -1
    
    found_component = false
    [[0, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [1, 1]].each do |start_e, start_s|
      temp_erratic = {}
      temp_status = {}
      stack = [[i, start_e, start_s]]
      temp_erratic[i] = start_e
      temp_status[i] = start_s
      
      ok = true
      while !stack.empty?
        u, e_u, s_u = stack.pop
        
        adj[u].each do |v, z|
          expected_s_v = (e_u ^ s_u ^ z)
          
          if temp_status.key?(v)
            if temp_status[v] != expected_s_v
              ok = false
              break
            end
          else
            temp_status[v] = expected_s_v
            temp_erratic[v] = 0
            stack << [v, 0, expected_s_v]
          end
        end
        break unless ok
      end
      
      if ok
        temp_erratic.each { |k, v| erratic[k] = v }
        temp_status.each { |k, v| status[k] = v }
        found_component = true
        break
      end
    end
    
    unless found_component
      possible = false
      break
    end
  end

  if possible
    puts erratic[1..n].join
  else
    puts "-1"
  end
end

def solve():

  return if input_data.empty?
  n = input_data[0]
  a = input_data[1..n]
  b = input_data[n+1..2*n]

  pair = Array.new(2 * n + 1, 0)
  fixed_count = 0
  
  (0...n).each do |i|
    if b[i] != -1
      pair[a[i]] = b[i]
      pair[b[i]] = a[i]
      fixed_count += 1
    end
  end

  used = Array.new(2 * n + 1, false)
  (1..2 * n).each do |i|
    if pair[i] != 0
      used[i] = true
    end
  end

  free_elements = []
  (1..2 * n).each do |i|
    free_elements << i unless used[i]
  end

  m = free_elements.size / 2
  
  dp = Array.new(m + 1, 0)
  dp[0] = 1
  
  (1..m).each do |i|
    new_dp = Array.new(m + 1, 0)
    (0..i).each do |j|
      if j > 0
        new_dp[j] = (new_dp[j] + dp[j-1]) % MOD
      end
      if i - 1 >= j
        new_dp[j] = (new_dp[j] + dp[j] * (2 * (i - 1 - j) + 1)) % MOD
      end
    end
    dp = new_dp
  end

  ans = dp[0]
  (1..m).each { |i| ans = (ans * i) % MOD }
  
  fact = [1]
  (1..n).each { |i| fact << (fact[-1] * i) % MOD }
  
  ans = (ans * fact[n]) % MOD
  
  inv_n = power(n, MOD - 2)
  ans = (ans * power(inv_n, 1)) % MOD
  
  final_res = calculate(n, a, b)
  puts final_res
end

def calculate(n, a, b)
  match = Array.new(2 * n + 1, 0)
  fixed = 0
  (0...n).each do |i|
    if b[i] != -1
      match[a[i]] = b[i]
      match[b[i]] = a[i]
      fixed += 1
    end
  end
  
  unassigned = []
  (1..2 * n).each { |i| unassigned << i if match[i] == 0 }
  
  m = unassigned.size / 2
  dp = Array.new(m + 1, 0)
  dp[0] = 1
  (1..m).each do |i|
    next_dp = Array.new(m + 1, 0)
    (0..i).each do |j|
      next_dp[j] = (next_dp[j] + dp[j] * (2 * i - 2 * j - 1)) % MOD if j < i
      next_dp[j] = (next_dp[j] + dp[j-1]) % MOD if j > 0
    end
    dp = next_dp
  end
  
  res = 0
  fact = Array.new(n + 1, 1)
  (2..n).each { |i| fact[i] = (fact[i-1] * i) % MOD }
  
  (0..m).each do |j|
    term = (dp[j] * fact[n - fixed - j]) % MOD
    if j % 2 == 1
      res = (res - term + MOD) % MOD
    else
      res = (res + term) % MOD
    end
  end
  res
end

      end
    end
    target_segments << [curr_val, curr_len]
  end

  m = target_segments.size
  dp = Array.new(m + 1, 0)
  dp[0] = 1

  (0...m).each do |i|
    next if dp[i] == 0
    val, len = target_segments[i]
    
    dp[i+1] = (dp[i+1] + dp[i]) % MOD
    
    if len >= 3
      ways = power(2, len - 3)
      (i+2..m).step(2) do |j|
        dp[j] = (dp[j] + dp[i] * ways) % MOD
        break if j + 1 > m
        next_val, next_len = target_segments[j-1]
        ways = (ways * power(2, next_len - 1)) % MOD
      end
    end
  end

  puts dp[m]

def power(a, b)
  return 1 if b < 0
  res = 1
  a %= MOD
  while b > 0
    res = (res * a) % MOD if b % 2 == 1
    a = (a * a) % MOD
    b /= 2
  end
  res
end

def main():

    Q = list(map(int, input().split()))

    Q = [q - 1 for q in Q]

    if total_items == 0:
        print(0)
        return
    

    red_steps = [-1] * N
    red_steps[X] = 0
    queue = deque([X])
    
    while queue:
        curr = queue.popleft()
        for i in range(N):
            if P[i] == curr and red_steps[i] == -1:
                red_steps[i] = red_steps[curr] + 1
                queue.append(i)
    

    blue_steps = [-1] * N
    blue_steps[X] = 0
    queue = deque([X])
    
    while queue:
        curr = queue.popleft()
        for i in range(N):
            if Q[i] == curr and blue_steps[i] == -1:
                blue_steps[i] = blue_steps[curr] + 1
                queue.append(i)
    

    max_steps = 0
    
    for i in range(N):
        if i == X:
            continue
            
        if A[i] > 0 and red_steps[i] == -1:
            print(-1)
            return
        if B[i] > 0 and blue_steps[i] == -1:
            print(-1)
            return
            
        if A[i] > 0:
            max_steps = max(max_steps, red_steps[i])
        if B[i] > 0:
            max_steps = max(max_steps, blue_steps[i])
    
    print(max_steps)

          return
        end
        

        new_state = [new_a, new_b]
        key = state_key(new_state)
        if !visited[key]
          visited[key] = true
          queue << [new_state, ops + 1]
        end
      end
    end
  end
  
  puts -1
end

def state_key(state)
  a, b = state
  "#{a.join(',')}|#{b.join(',')}"
end

main()

import sys

def solve():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data:
        return
    
    N = int(input_data[0])
    X = int(input_data[1])
    
    A = list(map(int, input_data[2:2+N]))
    B = list(map(int, input_data[2+N:2+2*N]))
    P = list(map(int, input_data[2+2*N:2+3*N]))
    Q = list(map(int, input_data[2+3*N:2+4*N]))
    
    P = [p - 1 for p in P]
    Q = [q - 1 for q in Q]
    X -= 1
    
    adj = [[] for _ in range(N)]
    for i in range(N):
        if P[i] != i:
            adj[P[i]].append(i)
        if Q[i] != i:
            adj[Q[i]].append(i)
            
    dist = [-1] * N
    queue = []
    
    dist[X] = 0
    queue.append(X)
    
    head = 0
    while head < len(queue):
        u = queue[head]
        head += 1
        for v in adj[u]:
            if dist[v] == -1:
                dist[v] = dist[u] + 1
                queue.append(v)
                
    ans = 0
    for i in range(N):
        if A[i] > 0 or B[i] > 0:
            if dist[i] == -1:
                print("-1")
                return
            ans += dist[i]
            
    print(ans)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()

def main()
  input_data = $stdin.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input_data.empty?
  
  ptr = 0
  n = input_data[ptr]; ptr += 1
  x = input_data[ptr] - 1; ptr += 1
  
  a = input_data[ptr, n]; ptr += n
  b = input_data[ptr, n]; ptr += n
  p = input_data[ptr, n].map { |v| v - 1 }; ptr += n
  q = input_data[ptr, n].map { |v| v - 1 }; ptr += n
  
  p_inv = Array.new(n)
  q_inv = Array.new(n)
  n.times do |i|
    p_inv[p[i]] = i
    q_inv[q[i]] = i
  end
  
  adj = Array.new(n) { [] }
  n.times do |i|
    adj[p_inv[i]] << i
    adj[q_inv[i]] << i
  end
  
  dist = Array.new(n, -1)
  queue = [x]
  dist[x] = 0
  
  head = 0
  while head < queue.size
    u = queue[head]
    head += 1
    adj[u].each do |v|
      if dist[v] == -1
        dist[v] = dist[u] + 1
        queue << v
      end
    end
  end
  
  ans = 0
  n.times do |i|
    if a[i] > 0
      if dist[i] == -1
        puts -1
        return
      end
      ans += dist[i]
    end
    if b[i] > 0
      if dist[i] == -1
        puts -1
        return
      end
      ans += dist[i]
    end
  end
  
  puts ans
end

def solve_for_position(A, k):
    aliens = A[:]
    jordan_pos = k
    jordan_size = aliens[jordan_pos]
    
    while True:
        absorbed = False
        

        if jordan_pos > 0 and aliens[jordan_pos - 1] < jordan_size:
            jordan_size += aliens[jordan_pos - 1]
            aliens.pop(jordan_pos - 1)
            jordan_pos -= 1
            absorbed = True

        elif jordan_pos < len(aliens) - 1 and aliens[jordan_pos + 1] < jordan_size:
            jordan_size += aliens[jordan_pos + 1]
            aliens.pop(jordan_pos + 1)
            absorbed = True
        
        if not absorbed:
            break
            
        aliens[jordan_pos] = jordan_size
    
    return jordan_size

def main():
    n = int(input())
    A = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    results = []
    for k in range(n):
        result = solve_for_position(A, k)
        results.append(result)
    
    print(' '.join(map(str, results)))

main()

    aliens = a.dup
    jordan_pos = k
    jordan_size = aliens[jordan_pos]
    
    loop do
      absorbed = false
      

      if jordan_pos > 0 && aliens[jordan_pos - 1] < jordan_size
        jordan_size += aliens[jordan_pos - 1]
        aliens.delete_at(jordan_pos - 1)
        jordan_pos -= 1
        absorbed = true

      elsif jordan_pos < aliens.length - 1 && aliens[jordan_pos + 1] < jordan_size
        jordan_size += aliens[jordan_pos + 1]
        aliens.delete_at(jordan_pos + 1)
        absorbed = true
      end
      

      aliens[jordan_pos] = jordan_size
      
      break unless absorbed
    end
    
    results << jordan_size
  end
  
  puts results.join(' ')
end

def solve
  n = gets.to_i
  a = gets.split.map(&:to_i)

  left_bound = Array.new(n)
  stack = []
  (0...n).each do |i|
    while !stack.empty? && a[stack.last] < a[i]
      stack.pop
    end
    left_bound[i] = stack.empty? ? -1 : stack.last
    stack << i
  end

  right_bound = Array.new(n)
  stack = []
  (n - 1).downto(0) do |i|
    while !stack.empty? && a[stack.last] < a[i]
      stack.pop
    end
    right_bound[i] = stack.empty? ? n : stack.last
    stack << i
  end

  prefix_sum = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (0...n).each { |i| prefix_sum[i + 1] = prefix_sum[i] + a[i] }

  ans = Array.new(n)
  (0...n).each { |i| ans[i] = a[i] }

  order = (0...n).to_a.sort_by { |i| a[i] }

  order.each do |i|
    l = left_bound[i]
    r = right_bound[i]
    
    current_sum = prefix_sum[r] - prefix_sum[l + 1]
    
    can_expand = false
    if l >= 0 && current_sum > a[l]
      current_sum = ans[l]
      can_expand = true
    end
    if r < n && current_sum > a[r]
      current_sum = ans[r]
      can_expand = true
    end
    
    ans[i] = current_sum
  end

  puts ans.join(' ')
end

solve
